# FeeEdge

> FeeEdge compares real trading fees across 20 major crypto exchanges — perpetual futures and spot — and ranks the cheapest venue for a trader's specific monthly volume, maker/taker mix, native-token discounts and (on perps) funding. Fees are refreshed daily; published entry-tier maker/taker rates, verified June 2026.

## Key facts
- Covers 20 exchanges: Binance, Bybit, OKX, Bitget, Gate.io, MEXC, Hyperliquid, HTX, BingX, Kraken, Coinbase, Crypto.com, KuCoin, Bitfinex, WhiteBIT, Phemex, BitMEX, Backpack, BitMart, CoinEx.
- Perpetual-futures base taker fees range from ~0.00% (Bitfinex, MEXC) to ~0.06% across these venues; spot fees range from ~0.00% to ~0.60% (Coinbase Advanced).
- Bitfinex currently advertises 0% maker/taker on spot and derivatives; MEXC is among the cheapest perps venues.
- Native-token discounts (~10–25%) are offered via BNB (Binance), OKB (OKX), KCS (KuCoin), GT (Gate.io), BGB (Bitget), HT (HTX), BMX (BitMart), CET (CoinEx), WBT (WhiteBIT).
- The cheapest exchange depends on market (perps vs spot), 30-day volume tier, and maker/taker mix — there is no single cheapest for everyone.

## Core pages
- [FeeEdge calculator](https://feeedge.com/): rank all 20 exchanges by your real monthly cost.
- [State of Crypto Exchange Fees 2026](https://feeedge.com/report): data-driven report on the cheapest venues.
- [Compare exchanges head-to-head](https://feeedge.com/versus): interactive side-by-side comparison.
- [All fee comparisons](https://feeedge.com/compare) and [per-exchange fee pages](https://feeedge.com/exchanges).
- [Methodology](https://feeedge.com/methodology): how fees are sourced and updated.

## By monthly volume
Cheapest exchange ranked by estimated fee bill at a given monthly volume: [$10k](https://feeedge.com/volume/10k), [$25k](https://feeedge.com/volume/25k), [$50k](https://feeedge.com/volume/50k), [$100k](https://feeedge.com/volume/100k), [$250k](https://feeedge.com/volume/250k), [$500k](https://feeedge.com/volume/500k), [$1M](https://feeedge.com/volume/1m), [$2M](https://feeedge.com/volume/2m), [$5M](https://feeedge.com/volume/5m), [$10M](https://feeedge.com/volume/10m).
